title: Twilight Forest Cave Fix
description: Fixes the bug that causes Twilight Forest's caves to cut off when beneath water
body:
This addon mod prevents the Twilight Forest's caves from cutting off due to being below rivers by removing the check for water  ### Before - After


 This is only for 1.20.1, 1.20.4 onwards already has this bug patched Only needs to be installed on server side Programming by Project8gbDeRam
